chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1461 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 01.11.2023 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for petitioner. No intimation is received. It appears from the record that neither petitioner nor his Counsel is pursuing this petition since long. Accordingly, the petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
